summary: Events management feature testing complete - All backend tests passed (9/9). All frontend tests passed. New feature: Admin panel Events tab (7th tab with calendar icon) allows creating, viewing, and deleting events. Events display on main page in 'Nadolazeći događaji' section. All previous features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: POST /api/admin/events creates event (requires admin auth)
✓ Backend: DELETE /api/admin/events/{id} deletes event (requires admin auth)
✓ Backend: GET /api/events returns upcoming events (public, no auth required)
✓ Backend: All endpoints return 401 without authentication
✓ Backend: Events filtered by date >= today (only upcoming events)
✓ Backend: Events sorted by date ascending
✓ Frontend: Admin panel has 7 tabs (locations, categories, businesses, tourism, events, notifications, settings)
✓ Frontend: Events tab (calendar icon) shows events list with count
✓ Frontend: Modal has all required fields (title, description, location_name, date, time)
✓ Frontend: Save button creates event and updates list immediately
✓ Frontend: Delete button (trash icon) removes event from list
✓ Frontend: Main page shows 'Nadolazeći događaji' section with event cards
✓ Frontend: Event cards display date (day/month), title, description, location, time
✓ Regression: All previous features working (map, search, categories, offers, tourism, leaderboard)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_events_crud.py - Created comprehensive test suite for admin events CRUD (9 tests)
seed_data_creation: Test event created and deleted during testing: 'TEST Playwright Event' (date: 2026-04-13, time: 19:00, location: Test Venue Gradačac). Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New admin events management feature fully functional. Admin panel now has 7 tabs including Events tab (calendar icon). Events management allows creating and deleting events with title, description, location_name, date, and optional time. Backend endpoints require admin authentication. Main page 'Nadolazeći događaji' section displays upcoming events with date, title, description, location, and time. All previous features verified working.
